name: Chilli Padel Club
nameThai: ชิลลี่ พาเดล คลับ
addressFull: Bun Kanchana 3, Pattaya City, Bang Lamung, Chon Buri 20150
hours: Current listings conflict: the official site says daily 07:00-24:00, Playtomic says daily 08:00-23:30, and Google Maps displayed a 09:00 opening at verification. Confirm before an early or late visit.

courts.configuration: One outdoor panoramic doubles court, four roofed panoramic doubles courts and one indoor single-wall court; five of six are protected from rain.

booking.hourlyRate: ฿1,000 per hour for the whole court
booking.offPeakRate: ฿600 per hour during published happy hours
booking.leadTime: No minimum is published; the official site says evenings fill first.
booking.notes: The happy-hour schedule itself is not published on the inspected page.

openPlay.levelGrading: All-level Americano, intermediate Mexicano, competitive King of the Court and Playtomic 0-7 grading.
openPlay.sessionCost: ฿600-800 for current social and coached Americano listings
openPlay.notes: The operator says a joinable game runs every day, with the exact weekly schedule released through its community group.

coaching.groupRate: From ฿800 for a 120-minute public class in the current Playtomic listing
coaching.beginnerCourse: A 90-minute first-timer introduction is offered; the separate coaching fee is unpublished

englishEvidence: The club directly identifies both current coaches as teaching all levels in English, Thai and Russian. Its English booking and matchmaking instructions are current, and recent English-language reviews describe actual play and staff service at this location.

audience.whoShouldSkip: Players who need air-conditioned courts should choose carefully: Chilli's rain-protected courts use fans and natural airflow rather than confirmed court AC.

praise: Recent Thai and translated international reviews praise the new court quality, friendly staff, welcoming reception and opening-period value.
Players describe the club as easy to use across skill levels, and recent reviews support the active social and international mix documented by the operator.
complaints: Several reviews from the opening period said parts of the complex, including changing or food facilities, were still being finished. The courts remained usable.
One regular player warned that tournaments occupy convenient time slots on several days, making advance planning important.

comparison.differentiator: The operating Pattaya club with the largest confirmed court count in this batch and the clearest daily partner-matching programme.

sources.label: Official club site for courts, hourly prices, hours and equipment
Google Maps identity, coordinates, status and location-specific reviews
Playtomic court configuration, booking, social sessions and coaching prices
Banmuang Thai report of the official opening ceremony

unverified: single authoritative current daily opening hours
padel.equipment.ballsIncluded for an ordinary court booking
opening/completion timing for the proposed seventh court
current completion status of the gym, sauna and all restaurant facilities mentioned during development
